MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT VIRGIN HOTELS SAN FRANCISCO, LLC'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The verified application of Lara Kasten Hoffman to appear pro hac vice as counsel to defendant is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
